title: Python Developer
message: Application ready - submit button found (dry run mode)
cover_letter:
As a Computer Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in Python backend development, I am excited to apply for the Python Developer role at Test Company. 

I have developed strong skills in Python, with expertise in REST API integration and CLI automation. My experience with frameworks like Django has equipped me to handle complex projects.

I am confident that my technical skills and experience as a Web Development Intern at S.S. Infotech make me a strong fit for this position. I look forward to discussing my application. 
Sincerely,
Devang Pujare
